source_pr.title: server: prefetch for DELETE and BatchPointGet when multi-statement
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #41367

ref https://github.com/pingcap/tiflow/pull/8395

Problem Summary: improve replication speed when using multi-statement (Data Migration scenario)

### What is changed and how it works?

copy the prefetch logic for UPDATE, and GitHub copilot is very helpful 😆 

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: Bazel test metadata change: `race` is turned off for a target (quarantine for race failures; no concrete failure signature in this case).
failure_signature: Bazel test metadata: `race = "off"` (quarantine / no concrete failure signature)
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: Although this PR contains functional changes (prefetch for DELETE/BatchPointGet in multi-statement), the only flaky signal captured in the case data is a Bazel test metadata change that turns off `race`. Disabling race is a quarantine action and does not explain the underlying root cause without the actual race report/logs. Keep this as insufficient evidence until we have the failing race output or a follow-up PR that fixes the underlying concurrency issue.
fix_pattern: Quarantine by disabling `race` without a concrete failure signature or root-cause fix; keep as insufficient evidence until race logs or a dedicated fix is available.

evidence: files: br/pkg/restore/BUILD.bazel, executor/BUILD.bazel, executor/executor.go, executor/seqtest/BUILD.bazel, executor/simpletest/BUILD.bazel, executor/simpletest/main_test.go, planner/core/point_get_plan.go, server/conn.go, server/conn_test.go

analysis:

Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
